notes: Faced $3.75M deficit from sales tax dips. Contracts with Santa Clara County Fire. Measure K half-cent sales tax generates ~$7M/yr. Department-level breakdown removed: the prior figures were fixed percentages of the general fund (12% Public Works, 8% Parks, 7% Community Development in every city), not published department budgets.

Capital improvement budget $10.1M in new funding. Contracts with Santa Clara County for some services. Department-level breakdown removed: the prior figures were fixed percentages of the general fund (12% Public Works, 8% Parks, 7% Community Development in every city), not published department budgets.
Contract city — contracts with Santa Clara County Sheriff. Official FY 2024-25 budget PDF lists $44.6M in all-funds expenditures and $30.6M in General Fund expenditures.

Faced $10.1M deficit from loss of Apple sales taxes. Closed with investment earnings and service cuts. Department-level breakdown removed: the prior figures were fixed percentages of the general fund (12% Public Works, 8% Parks, 7% Community Development in every city), not published department budgets.

Unique combined Dept of Public Safety (cross-trained police/fire/EMT). Operations $362.1M, Capital $296.6M, Debt/pension $72.3M. Total revenues $452.5M all funds. Property Tax $74.3M, Sales Tax $25.9M (FY 2023-24 actuals). YoY change +6.6%. Largest city in the Bay Area. Total budget includes enterprise funds (airport, water, sewer). Police and Fire together account for ~51% of General Fund. Home to Levi's Stadium and major tech employers. Total includes Silicon Valley Power (municipal utility), which significantly inflates total vs. general fund. Highest per-capita general fund spending in the region. Total budget includes Utilities (electric, gas, water, fiber) enterprise funds.
